Burn After Reading (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $60,355,347Details
International Box Office $107,812,451
Worldwide Box Office $168,167,798
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $20,202,485
Total $20,202,485
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a disc containing memoirs of a former CIA analyst falls into the hands of Linda Litzke and Chad Feldheimer, the two gym employees see a chance to make enough money for her to have life-changing cosmetic surgery. Predictably, events whirl out of control for the duo doofuses and those in their orbit.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$19,128,001 (31.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.16 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:35.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$37,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,651 opening theaters/2,657 max. theaters, 5.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $100,536,203

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 12th, 2008 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: April 29th, 2021 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: December 23rd, 2008 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for pervasive language, some sexual content and violence.
Running Time: 97 minutes
Plot point: Secret Agent
Subgenre: Black Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Relativity Media, Working Title Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When a disc containing memoirs of a former CIA analyst falls into the hands of Linda Litzke and Chad Feldheimer, the two gym employees see a chance to make enough money for her to have life-changing cosmetic surgery. Predictably, events whirl out of control for the duo doofuses and those in their orbit.

Opening Weekend:$19,128,001 (31.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.16 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)

Production Budget:$37,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,651 opening theaters/2,657 max. theaters, 5.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $100,536,203

Domestic Releases: September 12th, 2008 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: April 29th, 2021 (Limited) (Australia)
